rollup_extended_assessment.rationale: Score nudged from 8 to 8.5 because: (a) MT1 honest-chained-verification pattern continued to fire across later rounds (e.g. #date-3n-audit applied F6 explicit anti-paint-over check on the audit itself, #raw-66-trailer-format honest readonly inventory); (b) ACKNOWLEDGED-verdict pattern (MT2) explicitly used by 3 cycles in extended rounds; (c) methodology codification cycle materialized MT1/MT2 as canonical patterns AND #9-shape/#7-shape as PROVISIONAL — explicit promotion criteria avoid premature canonicalization (anti-inflation honesty). Not 9.0+ because: (a) #design-kick-witness-schema audit found 38 schema-non-canonical fields across cycles — the schema-honesty layer leaks; (b) at-origin audit found 5 substantively-modified .hexa files lacking @origin headers (provenance gap); (c) carry_forward_dependency_graph extraction itself revealed 21/32 orphan witnesses (no upstream attribution) — cross-cycle provenance is implicit, not explicit. These are systemic schema-layer honesty gaps — the per-cycle honesty is high, but inter-cycle metadata coherence is weak. Audit cycles surfaced these honestly.
